ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number (ISBN) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the book */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language the book is written in */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "cover_type" TEXT /* Type of cover (e.g., hardcover, paperback) */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the book */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., print, e-book) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Author's website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Author's social media links */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the author (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "script" TEXT /* Writing script (e.g., Latin, Cyrillic) */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the script (e.g., LTR, RTL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book available */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., available, out of stock) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level to trigger a new order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the book was sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, retail) */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code used during the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the book (out of 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review received */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the review is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_publishers" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_sales_summary" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales generated by the book */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the book */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the summary was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
